examples: I pledge that I will honor my wife

meanings.definition: pay (an amount of money) as a contribution to a charity or service, especially at regular intervals
examples: I pledged $10 a month to my favorite radio station
Let us toast the birthday girl!
Let's drink to the New Year

meanings.definition: bind or secure by a pledge
bound by or as if by an oath
examples: according to an early tradition became his sworn brother
